generators.description: Create a Stripe Checkout session server function
Create a customer billing portal session

patterns.name: Stripe Singleton
patterns.pattern: export const stripe = new Stripe(process.env.STRIPE_SECRET_KEY!, { apiVersion: '2024-12-18.acacia' })
patterns.description: Initialize Stripe client once as a singleton

patterns.name: Checkout Session
patterns.pattern: const session = await stripe.checkout.sessions.create({ mode: 'payment', line_items: [...] })
patterns.description: Create a Checkout session with line items

patterns.name: Webhook Verification
patterns.description: Always verify webhook signatures before processing

patterns.name: Idempotency Key
patterns.description: Pass idempotency keys for safe retries

steps: Add webhook endpoint and verify signatures
Test with Stripe CLI: stripe listen --forward-to localhost:3000/api/webhook

integrations.description: Stripe.js client for browser-side payment elements
steps: Use <PaymentElement /> for the hosted payment UI

questions.answer: Always verify webhook signatures using stripe.webhooks.constructEvent(). Never process webhook events without verification. Use the Stripe CLI to test webhooks locally.
Use Checkout sessions with mode: 'subscription' and provide price IDs for recurring plans. Handle subscription lifecycle via the customer.subscription.* webhook events.
Use test card 4242 4242 4242 4242 with any future expiry and CVC. Use 4000 0025 0000 3155 to test 3D Secure. Always use test mode API keys (sk_test_) in development.
